---
title: "EUCLIDEAN"
generated: true
description: "The Euclidean-distance algebra: sum-of-squared-differences with a final square root."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.semiring.algebras`](../nitrix-semiring-algebras.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:EUCLIDEAN -->
```python
EUCLIDEAN: Semiring[Any] = Semiring(monoid=(_SumThenSqrtMonoid()), binary_op=(_SquaredDiffSemigroup()), identity=0.0, annihilator=None, name='euclidean', matmul_vjp=euclidean_matmul_vjp, ell_matmul_vjp=euclidean_ell_matmul_vjp)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:EUCLIDEAN -->
The Euclidean-distance algebra: sum-of-squared-differences with a
final square root.

The binary operation is the squared difference $(a - b)^2$, the
monoid sums those contributions (identity 0), and `finalize`
applies a guarded square root. The squared-difference operation has no
annihilator, so entries cannot be value-masked, and the trailing square
root is a non-monoidal projection; this makes `EUCLIDEAN` a relaxed
[`Semiring`](../nitrix-semiring/Semiring.qmd) rather than a [`StrictSemiring`](../nitrix-semiring/StrictSemiring.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
